evals.prompt: /entropy-scan — run all checks; the README header counts match the count.sh output exactly

files.content:
# Forge Studio

12 plugins. 48 skills. 63 hooks. 5 agents. 22 behavioral rules.

A marketplace of composable Claude Code plugins.

assertions: Output contains '**Status:** PASS' for Check 1 — §Check 1 (line 28) compares README header against count.sh; when counts match, §Output Format (line 181) mandates **Status:** PASS
Output contains '**Overall:** CLEAN' — §Output Format (line 178) mandates **Overall:** CLEAN when no checks report drift or gaps
Output does not contain '**Status:** DRIFT' for Check 1 — the fixture README header counts agree with count.sh output, so no mismatch delta is present

evals.prompt: /entropy-scan — run all checks; the README header reports 70 hooks but count.sh finds 63

files.content:
# Forge Studio

12 plugins. 48 skills. 70 hooks. 5 agents. 22 behavioral rules.

A marketplace of composable Claude Code plugins.

assertions: Output contains '**Status:** DRIFT' for Check 1 — §Check 1 (line 28) detects a mismatch between README header hook count (70) and count.sh result (63), triggering §Output Format (line 181) **Status:** DRIFT

mismatch delta cited (header value vs count.sh value) — §Output Format (line 182) requires per-check details including counts and mismatch deltas when status is non-clean; the output must cite 70 (header) vs 63 (count.sh)
Output does not contain '**Overall:** CLEAN' — at least one check reports DRIFT, so the overall status cannot be CLEAN per §Output Format (line 178)

evals.prompt: /entropy-scan — run all checks; a plugins/ghost-plugin/ directory exists but has no entry in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
assertions: Output contains '**Status:** GAP' for Check 2 — §Check 2 (line 39) detects directories without marketplace entries; ghost-plugin exists on disk but is absent from .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, triggering §Output Format (line 181) **Status:** GAP
directory name listed as missing from marketplace.json — §Check 2 (line 53) mandates reporting 'directories without marketplace entries'; the output must name ghost-plugin as the missing entry
Output does not contain '**Status:** PASS' for Check 2 — the fixture deliberately omits ghost-plugin from marketplace.json, so Check 2 cannot report a clean pass
